top_signals.title: Two tropical storms bring heavy rains to parts of Japan
top_signals.summary: Level 4 landslide warnings were issued for Tokyo's Izu islands as well as some areas of Shizuoka and Kanagawa Prefectures and a broad swath of southern Chiba prefecture.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
